levels.body: The word *worsted* describes "a fine, smooth fabric made from closely-twisted yarn spun of long-staple wool combined to lay the fibres parallel" ("mufflers", *n*. 1. a).
worksCited: "Worsted, *n*. 1. a", *OED Online*, Oxford University Press, October 2020. https://www.oed.com/view/Entry/230367?rskey=QGVv2K&result=2&isAdvanced=false#eid. Accessed 1 October 2020.
